name: Brainwashed
description:
This model gains the following ability:

Knock Some Sense Into Ya: Another friendly model may target this model with the Interact action to remove this upgrade.

This model gains the following trigger on all its attack actions:

granted_abilities.name: Knock Some Sense Into Ya
granted_abilities.text: Another friendly model may target this model with the Interact action to remove this upgrade.

granted_triggers.name: Fumble Around in Confusion
granted_triggers.text: This trigger must be declared, if able. Immediately, this action fails. Deal 2 damage to this model.

extraction_notes: This upgrade grants a trigger to all attack actions rather than a specific action. The trigger is placed in a separate 'granted_triggers' field to indicate it applies universally to all the model's attack actions.
The trigger has 'This trigger must be declared, if able' which indicates it is mandatory.
The timing 'This trigger must be declared' occurs during the declaration phase, mapped to 'when_declaring'.
